ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type (e.g., NLH, PLO) */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee for the tournament */,
  "first_place_prize" REAL /* Prize for the first-place winner */,
  "total_entries" INTEGER /* Total number of entries */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool of the tournament */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the tournament took place */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Date when registrations started */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* Date when registrations ended */,
  "guaranteed_prize_pool" REAL /* Guaranteed prize pool amount */,
  "rake_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of rake for each entry */,
  "is_re_entry_allowed" INTEGER /* Whether re-entry is allowed */,
  "is_re_buy_allowed" INTEGER /* Whether re-buy is allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant registered */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residency */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the participant's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the result belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who achieved this result */,
  "placement" INTEGER /* Placement of the participant in the tournament */,
  "prize_amount" REAL /* Prize amount won by the participant */,
  "is_winner" INTEGER /* Whether the participant won the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament related to the prize */,
  "placement" INTEGER /* Placement for which the prize is awarded */,
  "prize_amount" REAL /* Amount of the prize for the given placement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prizes_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., NLH, PLO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description providing more details about the event */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Specific game type (e.g., Texas Hold'em, Omaha) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., player, administrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the role entails */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction (positive for deposits, negative for payouts) */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., entry fee, prize payout) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament related to the feedback */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant giving feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., reminder, announcement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event schedule entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament associated with the schedule */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the tournament */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Expected duration of the tournament */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the tournament start time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedule_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant in the leaderboard */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the participant in the leaderboard */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the participant in the leaderboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payout_structures" (
  "payout_structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payout structure entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament associated with the payout structure */,
  "number_of_payouts" INTEGER /* Number of payouts for the tournament */,
  "payout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the prize pool allocated to each payout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payout_structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payout_structures_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)
